questionText: Provide any additional contextual and/or verification/assurance information relevant to your organization's taxonomy alignment.
questionKo: 부합한 분류체계와 관련한 추가 정보 및 / 또는 검증 / 보증 정보를 입력하십시오 .
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This question helps data users interpret the information organizations provide on the alignment of their spending/revenue with a sustainable finance taxonomy. Assurance and verification provides confidence in the accuracy of data reported.

columns.text: Additional contextual information relevant to your taxonomy accounting
columns.textKo: Additional contextual information relevant to your taxonomy accounting

columns.text: Indicate whether you will be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1
columns.textKo: whether you will be providing 검증/검증 information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in 문항 13.1을/를 표시하십시오.

columns.text: Explain why you will not be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 you will not be providing 검증/검증 information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in 문항 13.1

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "A sustainable finance taxonomy" in response to column "Methodology or framework used to assess alignment with your organization's climate transition" of 5.4.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "A sustainable finance taxonomy" in response to 열 "방법론 또는 framework used to assess alignment with 귀사의 climate transition" of 5.4.

guidance.text:
Details of minimum safeguards analysis (column 1) 
This column only appears if "At both organization and activity level" is selected in column 4 of question 5.4.
Use this column to provide information on the minimum safeguards analysis undertaken for all your activities reported in 5.4.2.
For activities that you selected "Yes" in column 32 of question 5.4.2, describe how the activities comply with international best practices for sustainable business and social safeguards.
For activities that you selected "No" in column 32, explain why the activities do not comply with international best practices for sustainable business and social safeguards.
Additional contextual information relevant to your taxonomy alignment (column 2) 
You may use this column to provide information related to the scope of your activities subjected to taxonomy evaluation. You may report information on your activities that do not fall within the scope of taxonomy-eligible activities listed in column 1 of 5.4.2.
You may also elaborate on any assumptions made to determine your taxonomy-eligible activities, for example of the financial accounting system used to calculate the figures for turnover, CAPEX and, where relevant, OPEX in 5.4.1 and 5.4.2.
If you are disclosing against the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities, you may report contextual information on the turnover, CAPEX and OPEX KPIs as specified by the Disclosure Delegated Act (Annex I, p20).
Indicate whether you will be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1 (column 3) 
Select "Yes" if you have undertaken verification and/or assurance of your taxonomy reporting via a third party. You should provide information related to your verification and/or assurance and relevant attachments in question 13.1.
Select "No" if you have not undertaken verification and/or assurance of your taxonomy reporting via third party.
Organizations disclosing against the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities may use this column to indicate whether they have provided information related to their compliance with the assurance requirements under the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD).
Explain why you will not be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1 (column 4) 
This column only appears if you have selected "No" in column 3.
You may use this column to explain why you have not undertaken an assurance assessment of your taxonomy reporting. You may also elaborate on any plans to undertake an assurance assessment of your taxonomy data in the future.
Organizations disclosing against the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities may use this column to indicate their plans to comply with the assurance requirements under the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD).
Attach any supporting evidence (column 5) 
You may use this column to attach any evidence or reports referenced in column 1 (e.g., minimum safeguards analysis).
guidance.textKo: Details of minimum safeguards analysis (열 1) This 열 only appears 만약 "At both organization 및 activity level" is 선택 in 열 4 of 문항 5.4. Use this 열 to provide information on the minimum safeguards analysis undertaken for all your activities 보고 in 5.4.2. For activities that you 선택 "예" in 열 32 of 문항 5.4.2, 설명 how the activities comply with international best practices for sustainable business 및 social safeguards. For activities that you 선택 "아니요" in 열 32, 그 이유를 설명 the activities do not comply with international best practices for sustainable business 및 social safeguards. Additional contextual information relevant to your taxonomy alignment (열 2) You may use this 열 to provide information related to the scope of your activities subjected to taxonomy evaluation. You may report information on your activities that do not fall within the scope of taxonomy-획득 가능 activities listed in 열 1 of 5.4.2. You may also elaborate on 하나 이상 assumptions made to determine your taxonomy-획득 가능 activities, for example 의 financial accounting system used to calculate the figures for turnover, 자본지출(CAPEX) and, 여기서 relevant, 운영비용(OPEX) in 5.4.1 및 5.4.2. 만약 you are disclosing against the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities, you may report contextual information on the turnover, 자본지출(CAPEX) 및 운영비용(OPEX) KPIs as specified by the Disclosure Delegated Act (Annex I, p20). Indicate whether you will be providing 검증/검증 information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in 문항 13.1 (열 3) Select "예" 만약 you have undertaken 검증 및/또는 검증 of your taxonomy reporting via a third party. You 해야 합니다 provide information related to your 검증 및/또는 검증 및 relevant attachments in 문항 13.1. Select "아니요" 만약 you have not undertaken 검증 및/또는 검증 of your taxonomy reporting via third party. Organizations disclosing against the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities may use this 열 to indicate whether they have 입력 information related to their compliance with the 검증 requirements under the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD). 그 이유를 설명 you will not be providing 검증/검증 information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in 문항 13.1 (열 4) This 열 only appears 만약 you have 선택 "아니요" in 열 3. You may use this 열 to 그 이유를 설명 you have not undertaken an 검증 assessment of your taxonomy reporting. You may also elaborate on 하나 이상 plans to undertake an 검증 assessment of your taxonomy data in the future. Organizations disclosing against the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities may use this 열 to indicate their plans to comply with the 검증 requirements under the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD). Attach 하나 이상 supporting evidence (열 5) You may use this 열 to attach 하나 이상 evidence 또는 reports referenced in 열 1 (e.g., minimum safeguards analysis).

guidance.text: Organizations are transparent about their approach to assessing alignment with sustainable finance taxonomies and the alignment is verified/assured by a third party.
guidance.textKo: Organizations are transparent about their approach to assessing alignment with sustainable finance taxonomies 및 the alignment is verified/assured by a third party.

guidance.text:
1
2
3
4
5
Details of minimum safeguards analysis
Additional contextual information relevant to your taxonomy accounting
Indicate whether you will be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1
Please explain why you will not be providing verification/assurance information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in question 13.1
Attach any supporting evidence
We have complied with the minimum safeguards assessment for our activities in the solar PVC and CSP manufacturing sector as per the EU Taxonomy requirement. We assessed compliance across 12 of our manufacturing sites in 3 countries. We adhere to the minimum safeguards criteria through a human rights risk assessment based on the UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights. Risk specific measures identified from the analysis will be implemented by the end of 2024.
We have outlined a long-term proposal in our CAPEX and OPEX planning document to invest in recycling technology for end-of-life solar panels to be reinserted into the manufacturing process. In the short-term, we have outlined a plan to contract with external waste treatment and recycling facilities to outsource our recycling process. In this way we hope to achieve alignment with the do no significant harm criteria of the Taxonomy Regulation and boost our alignment.
Yes
N/A
[Evidence of minimum safeguards analysis attached]
guidance.textKo: 1 2 3 4 5 Details of minimum safeguards analysis Additional contextual information relevant to your taxonomy accounting Indicate whether you will be providing 검증/검증 information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in 문항 13.1 Please 그 이유를 설명 you will not be providing 검증/검증 information relevant to your taxonomy alignment in 문항 13.1 Attach 하나 이상 supporting evidence We have complied with the minimum safeguards assessment for our activities in the solar PVC 및 CSP manufacturing sector as per the EU Taxonomy requirement. We assessed compliance across 12 of our manufacturing sites in 3 countries. We adhere to the minimum safeguards criteria through a human rights risk assessment based on the UN Guiding Principles on Business 및 Human Rights. Risk specific measures identified from the analysis will be implemented by the end of 2024. We have outlined a long-term proposal in our 자본지출(CAPEX) 및 운영비용(OPEX) planning document to invest in recycling technology for end-of-life solar panels to be reinserted into the manufacturing 프로세스. In the short-term, we have outlined a plan to contract with external waste treatment 및 recycling facilities to outsource our recycling 프로세스. In this way we hope to achieve alignment with the do no significant harm criteria 의 Taxonomy Regulation 및 boost our alignment. 예 N/A [Evidence of minimum safeguards analysis attached]

guidance.text:
Assurance assessment: a process by which a practitioner aims to obtain sufficient appropriate evidence in order to express a conclusion designed to enhance the degree of confidence of the intended users about the sustainability information. 
Minimum safeguards:  a taxonomy-eligible activity that substantially contributes to one or more of the taxonomy's objectives and does not cause significant harm to any other environmental objective may only qualify as an environmentally sustainable (i.e., ‘taxonomy-aligned') if it complies with international best practices for sustainable business and social safeguards. In relation to the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities, these refer to the OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises and the UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights, including the principles and rights set out in the eight fundamental conventions identified in the Declaration of the International Labour Organization on Fundamental Principles and Rights at Work and the International Bill of Human Rights. 
Third-party verification: verification conducted by an independent entity that does not provide other services to the company ( AFi, 2024 ).
guidance.textKo: 검증 assessment: a 프로세스 by which a practitioner aims to obtain sufficient appropriate evidence in order to express a conclusion designed to enhance the degree of confidence 의 intended users about the sustainability information. Minimum safeguards: a taxonomy-획득 가능 activity that substantially contributes to one 또는 more 의 taxonomy's objectives 및 does not cause significant harm to 하나 이상 other environmental objective may only qualify as an environmentally sustainable (i.e., ‘taxonomy-aligned') 만약 it complies with international best practices for sustainable business 및 social safeguards. In relation to the EU Taxonomy for Sustainable Activities, these refer to the OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises 및 the UN Guiding Principles on Business 및 Human Rights, 포함 the principles 및 rights set out in the eight fundamental conventions identified in the Declaration 의 International Labour Organization on Fundamental Principles 및 Rights at Work 및 the International Bill of Human Rights. Third-party 검증: 검증 conducted by an independent entity that does not provide other services to the company ( AFi, 2024 ).
